name: S2E1 复工协议
desc: 第二季开篇·物品大罢工。与同名试卷配套：罢工/劳工主题词汇 + 初三+高阶语法陷阱（非谓语·倒装·情态完成式·虚拟·从句·错综条件）。

m4.q: ___, the whole house overslept and missed the bus.
ops: With the alarm clock refusing to ring
With the alarm clock refused to ring
Because the alarm clock refusing to ring
The alarm clock refusing to ring it
m4.why: with + 名词 + 现在分词，逻辑主动用 doing。

m4.q: The owner ___ it long ago, but he never listened.
m4.why: 过去本应做却没做，用 should have done。

m4.q: The question of ___ remained unanswered all evening.
ops: whether did the chair start it
m4.why: 介词后只能 whether（非 if），从句用陈述语序。

m4.q: ___ the armchair's complaints that even the bookshelf nodded.
m4.why: So+adj 置句首倒装；complaints 复数用 were。

m4.q: I ___ get a day off. Not once in three years.
m4.why: not once 锁定 never；肯定句不用 ever 表“从不”。

m5.q: "It ___ this by itself." Someone opened that door from outside.
m5.why: 对过去的否定推测，用 can't have done。

m5.q: If the chair ___ the first to whisper 'strike' that morning, the house ___ so quiet now.
m5.why: 错综条件：过去条件 hadn't been + 现在结果 wouldn't be。

m5.q: Two loads a day for ten years. I want to be paid for all this ___.
m5.why: overtime 一个词=加班；over time 两个词=随时间推移。

m5.q: The harder he tried, the ___ the house became.
m5.why: the+比较级…；quiet 的比较级是 quieter，不是 more quiet。

m5.q: We've held this family up for fifteen years. It's high time we ___ replaced.
m5.why: It's high time + 主语 + 过去式（虚拟）。
